summary: Tested both new P0 KB flows end-to-end. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passing in /app/backend/tests/test_kb_p0.py covering POST /api/kb/docs (publish/draft, validation, aspirant 403), /api/kb/docs/mine (drafts+published, sort, auth), /api/kb/docs/{id} (draft 404), admin /kb/stats /kb/docs (filters status/category/q), PATCH (publish toggle decrements category doc_count, feature flip), DELETE, /admin/kb/categories list, POST (with duplicate slug rejection), PATCH. Frontend: practitioner sees kb-contribute-cta on /knowledge-base; aspirant does NOT and is redirected from /knowledge-base/new with error toast; full two-step contribute flow works (Step1 doctype tile → Step2 fields → preview toggle → Save Draft navigates back to /knowledge-base with success toast; Publish navigates to /knowledge-base/<slug>/<docId>). Admin /admin/knowledge-base loads with all required data-testids (kb-admin-stats, kb-docs-table, all 4 tabs, kb-docs-search, kb-docs-filter-category), sidebar `admin-nav-knowledge-base` present, action menu (kb-menu-<docId>) opens and Unpublish/Mark-as-featured succeed, Categories panel toggles open, new category create works (toast shown), 8 edit-category-<slug> buttons rendered. Regression smoke: login + KB home load + admin dashboard load all OK.

issues: Cookie consent banner stays pinned to bottom and can overlap the fixed action buttons at the bottom of /knowledge-base/new (Save draft / Publish bar). First Playwright run failed to click Save because of the overlay; works after Decline/Accept. Consider auto-dismissing for authenticated sessions or anchoring it as a top toast.

action_items: (Low priority) Make cookie consent banner not overlap fixed bottom action bars on contribute page, or move it to a corner toast.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/kb/docs and admin patch/delete correctly adjust kb_categories.doc_count on publish state transitions and category moves — verified via test_patch_toggle_publish_and_feature. No ObjectId leaks observed in any of the new endpoints (all use {_id: 0} projection or pop _id post-insert as in admin_create_kb_category).
KBDocIn does not bound max lengths for title/summary/body or limit body size; abusive payloads could store arbitrarily large markdown. Consider Field(max_length=...) limits.
POST /api/admin/kb/categories doesn't return 409 for duplicate slug — returns 400. Acceptable but 409 is more REST-correct.
No DELETE endpoint for admin/kb/categories — only is_hidden toggle. Test cleanup leaves test categories hidden but persisted. Consider adding admin_delete_kb_category for full cleanup.
server.py is now 1803 lines (was 750) — strongly recommend splitting into routers (auth.py, posts.py, kb.py, admin.py) before it grows further.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_kb_p0.py (new pytest suite for KB P0 endpoints)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all KB P0 flows verified — practitioner CTA, aspirant block, contribute step1+step2, preview toggle, save draft, publish, admin stats/table/tabs/search/filter/menu actions/categories panel/create/edit)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@hcmorbit.com / Admin123! • Practitioner: elena_carter@hcmorbit.demo / Demo123! • Aspirant: priya_hcm@hcmorbit.demo / Demo123! (all from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: All TEST_-prefixed docs created during testing were deleted via admin DELETE endpoint. One TEST_UI_Category created via UI was hidden + renamed TEST_HIDDEN_test-ui-cat-* (no admin delete category endpoint exists; it is excluded from public listings via is_hidden=true). Backend pytest creates ~3-4 TEST_KB_DOC_* docs per run, all cleaned up in module teardown. Two leftover TEST_HIDDEN_test-cat-* categories from previous backend runs are still present but hidden from the public /kb/categories endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 KB features (Contribute + Admin KB panel) are fully working: backend 17/17 tests pass, frontend flows all verified end-to-end including category count adjustments on publish toggle. The only UX nit is the cookie banner overlapping the contribute page's fixed action bar — easy fix for main agent. Backend file server.py is approaching 1800 lines; recommend splitting routers. No regression bugs found in previously-tested flows (login, KB home, admin dashboard).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in the new P0 features.
